claims.summary: Astrid transitions should be first-class durable and replyable objects rather than mode side effects.
claims.disposition: Verify phase_transition_card persistence, replyability, and source ownership in current source.

claims.summary: Transition type, perspective, phenomenology, spectral anchors, visibility, and shared identity must remain explicit.
claims.disposition: Verify V2/V2.5 card and affordance fields preserve those dimensions.

claims.summary: A transition can be witnessed or answered without automatically triggering MomentCapture or live behavior.
claims.disposition: Verify relational and stable-fill high-entropy transition regressions.

claims.summary: Replyable transition evidence remains language-only and non-controlling.
claims.disposition: Verify every phase-card authority marker excludes pressure, fill, PI, controller, deploy, and peer mutation.
